cases.prompt_body: Single Therac-25 technician in a white clinical coat seated at the treatment console in a dim control room, posture practiced and unalarmed, neutral skin tones with only faint monitor spill on the cheek and hands, subdued screen glow that does not dominate the face, one small warning state treated as ordinary workflow while the trusted machine remains offscreen, beige panels, charcoal equipment, clean clinical tension
